security.title: Security
security.activeSessionsHint: Devices currently signed in to your account.

mfa.title: 2FA
mfa.hint: Add an extra layer of security by requiring a code from your authenticator app when signing in.
mfa.recommendedCopy: Protect your admin account with a code from your authenticator app. You can set this up in a minute.

banner.title: Strengthen your account security
banner.message: Two-factor authentication is not enabled yet. Add it in Settings when you are ready.

mfa.disableHint: Enter your password to turn off two-factor authentication.
mfa.passwordRequiredMessage: Please enter your current password to disable 2FA.
mfa.setupStep: Scan with your authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator, 1Password)
mfa.backupCodesHint: Store these codes in a safe place. Each can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app.
mfa.backupCodesAttestation: I have stored these backup codes securely
mfa.copyBackupCodesFailedMessage: Could not copy backup codes. Try download instead.

toast.enterCodeMessage: Please enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
toast.disabledMessage: Two-factor authentication has been turned off.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Display options for this browser. Other devices are not affected.
preferences.interfaceMotionHint: Shortens transitions across the admin app using design tokens. Stored only on this device.
preferences.deliveryPreferencesHint: Per-browser toggles for live report alerts. This does not change settings on other devices.
preferences.soundOnNewReportsCaption: Plays a subtle chime when a new report arrives in real time
preferences.serverAlertsNote: Server-managed alerts still appear in the top bar and Notifications page.
preferences.localeFootnote: Locale preference is stored in this browser.

environment.title: Environment
environment.restricted: This section is restricted to super administrators.
environment.confirmSaveDescription: Updated values take effect immediately across the platform.

featureFlags.title: Feature flags
featureFlags.description: Enable or disable features across the platform.

moderationEmails.title: Moderation emails
moderationEmails.description: Immediate email when user actions need admin review. Delivery requires platform email (`EMAIL_ENABLED`, `email_enabled`, and `admin_moderation_email_enabled` flags).
moderationEmails.loadError: Unable to load preferences. Try refreshing the page.

NEW_REPORT.title: New pollution reports
NEW_REPORT.description: When a citizen submits a report that enters the moderation queue.

EVENT_PENDING.title: Events pending approval
EVENT_PENDING.description: When a cleanup event is created or returns to pending review.

UGC_REPORT.title: UGC reports
UGC_REPORT.description: When a user flags content (comments, chat, profiles, sites, events).

CHECKIN_RISK.title: Check-in risk signals
CHECKIN_RISK.description: When a participant checks in far from the event site.

securityModals.signOutOthersDescription: This will revoke access for all other devices. You will stay signed in on this device.
securityModals.updatePasswordDescription: Your new password will take effect on your next sign in.

securityToast.passwordUpdatedMessage: Use your new password next sign in.
